channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Monaro Screens recognised as finalist in 2026 Australian Small Business Champion Awards
item.description: Monaro Screens, a family-owned business serving Canberra for over 30 years, has been named a finalist in the 2026 Australian Small Business Champion Awards. The company is recognised in the Trade Serv...

item.title: Deadly bus bombing in Colombia’s Cauca region highlights escalating armed violence
item.description: At least 13 people were killed and 38 others injured when an explosive device detonated on a bus travelling along the Pan-American Highway in the municipality of Cajibio, in Colombia’s southwest Cauca...

item.title: Space Technology Enhances South Africa's Border and National Security Management
item.description: In South Africa, space technology is increasingly being leveraged to address critical national challenges. The South African National Space Agency (Sansa) collaborates with the Border Management Autho...

item.title: First Nations leaders oppose proposed Métis self-government treaty over rights and consultation concerns
item.description: A proposed treaty aimed at recognizing and implementing self-government for the Red River Métis has advanced to second reading in Canada’s House of Commons, marking a significant step in a long-standi...

item.title: Fossil Discovery Reveals Giant Octopus That Competed with Sharks in the Cretaceous Period
item.description: A groundbreaking discovery has shaken up our understanding of prehistoric oceans. Researchers have unearthed fossil evidence of a colossal octopus, scientifically named *Nanaimoteuthis haggarti*, that...

item.title: President Trump commends law enforcement after gunfire incident at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: During the White House Correspondents’ Dinner at the Washington Hilton Hotel, a person discharged multiple shots near the security checkpoint, prompting a rapid evacuation of President Donald Trump an...

item.title: Abdulrahman Haske Announces His Candidacy for Adamawa Governorship in 2027
item.description: The Adamawa State capital, Yola, was filled with excitement on Saturday as Abdulrahman Bashir Haske officially declared his intention to run for governor in the 2027 elections under the All Progressiv...

item.title: Public Hospital Land in Abuja Allegedly Converted to Private Estate, Raising Accountability Concerns
item.description: For Abuja Wuye District, one 3.1-hectare land wey dem originally set aside for hospital don dey used now for private residential estate, and this matter don cause serious public anger. The land, wey s...

item.title: Study links ultra-processed foods to reduced attention and higher dementia risk
item.description: A recent Monash University study has revealed that diets high in ultra-processed foods (UPFs) can negatively affect cognitive function, even among Australians following otherwise healthy diets. Analys...

item.title: Anurag Banerjee Discusses His Book 'The Songs of Our People' on Shillong's Music Scene
item.description: Anurag Banerjee's book, 'The Songs of Our People', captures the diverse and vibrant music scene of Shillong, tracing the evolution of local genres from rap and R&B to choirs and folk fusion. The first...

item.title: Trump and Melania Safely Evacuated from White House Correspondents' Dinner After Gunshots Heard
item.description: On 26 April 2026, US President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump were swiftly evacuated from the White House Correspondents' Dinner at the Washington Hilton following reports of gunshots insid...

item.title: The Heroic Evacuation of Pripyat: One Woman's Fight to Save 45,000 Lives Amid Chernobyl's Catastrophic Radiation
item.description: On April 26, 1986, the explosion of reactor number four at the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant unleashed a radioactive cloud that devastated the surrounding areas, including Pripyat. In the midst of thi...

item.title: Families of drug war victims find renewed hope as Duterte faces ICC trial
item.description: The article reflects on the decade-long struggle of families of victims of former President Rodrigo Duterte’s war on drugs, highlighting how their fight for justice is finally gaining momentum. Journa...

item.title: Ka Mangyan and Julius Mantala Share Their Wedding Vows
item.description: On April 26, 2026, Ka Mangyan and Julius Mantala celebrated a heartfelt milestone in their relationship by exchanging wedding vows, marking the official beginning of their married life. The ceremony r...

item.title: Opposition leaders agree to present joint candidate and resist single-party dominance ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: Top opposition political figures for Nigeria don come together for one major summit wey happen for Ibadan, Oyo State, under the hosting of Governor Seyi Makinde. The meeting, tagged National Summit of...

item.title: Manipur Conflict: Deep Divisions, Militarisation, and the Search for Lasting Peace
item.description: The article reflects on the continuing violence and humanitarian distress in Manipur, three years after the conflict intensified in 2023. It highlights how the state remains deeply divided along ethni...

item.title: Strong outing from Kevin Gausman and Okamoto’s homer lead Blue Jays past Guardians
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5–3 win over the Cleveland Guardians, powered by a solid pitching performance from Kevin Gausman and a key home run from Okamoto. Gausman delivered an effective start, ...

item.title: Rising diesel costs threaten Sea Harvest earnings despite strong global demand for hake
item.description: Sea Harvest, one of South Africa’s largest fishing groups, has warned that sharply rising diesel prices could weigh on its earnings in the 2026 financial year, despite a strong operational performance...

item.title: Exploring folklore and the uncanny in the anthology ‘Bandigoat’
item.description: This review examines Bandigoat: A Collection of Strange and Horrible Tales, a speculative fiction anthology published by Blaft Publications, known for its focus on unconventional and genre-bending lit...

item.title: Belconnen Magpies AFL games relocated due to Kippax Oval safety concerns
item.description: The ACT government will meet with the Belconnen Magpies AFL club to discuss safety concerns regarding their home ground, Kippax Oval. The first home games of the season had to be moved to Queanbeyan a...
